beats.narration: Tom assesses the smoke damage to his café after the electrical fire.
Tom leaves the high street and heads to the Zava Insurance Claims Office to lodge his claim.
Tom walks into the Zava Insurance building and approaches reception.
Tom lodges his Business — café smoke damage claim at the Zava Insurance reception.
Iris captures the property and business-interruption details.
Iris routes the claim to the Claims Assessor.
Adam reviews the commercial cover and exclusions.
Adam confirms property and business-interruption cover.
Lara schedules a site visit to estimate restoration costs.
Sam lines up smoke-restoration specialists and a temporary kitchen.
Theo reviews the high-value claim and signs off.
Adam hands the claim to Settlement.
Seth issues an interim payment plus business-interruption support.
Cara walks Tom through the final decision — claim APPROVED — including the interim payment and staged settlement plan.
